name: Broken Back Glass
description: Cracked or shattered rear glass panel

name: Cracked Camera Glass
description: Cracked glass over rear camera module

name: Rough Body / Dents
description: Visible dents, scratches or scuffs on frame or body

name: Face ID Not Working
description: Face ID biometric sensor is non-functional (typically irreparable)

name: Touch ID Not Working
description: Home button fingerprint sensor is non-functional (typically irreparable)

name: Faulty Charging Port
description: Charging port does not charge reliably or is physically damaged

name: Faulty Rear Camera
description: One or more rear cameras are non-functional or produce poor images

name: Faulty Front Camera
description: Front-facing camera is non-functional or produces poor images

name: Battery Degraded
description: Battery health below 80% or battery is swollen

name: Speaker / Microphone Fault
description: Earpiece, loudspeaker or microphone not working correctly

name: Water Damage
description: Liquid Contact Indicator triggered or internal corrosion visible

name: Screen Replaced (Non-Original)
description: Display has been replaced with a non-Apple original part

name: Battery Replaced
description: Battery has been replaced (original or third-party)

name: Back Glass Replaced (Non-Original)
description: Rear glass panel has been replaced with a non-original part

name: Camera Replaced (Non-Original)
description: Rear camera module has been replaced with a non-original part
